positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a mountain range and a celestial body (moon/planet) set against a gradient, aurora-lit sky. The foreground silhouette features diverse wildlife, including stylized deer, elk, and a soaring eagle, drawn with clean, graphic lines. The overall aesthetic is inspired by Pacific Northwest tattoo art and modern minimalist lithography, using deep indigo, burnt orange, sage green, and cream as primary colors. Composition must be centralized and contained within a single printable panel. High contrast silhouette style, perfect for screen printing on t-shirts. Vector art quality, clean lines, perfect symmetry. --ar 1:1 --s 750
negative: blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, low detail, messy, noise, poor anatomy, artifact, extra limbs, dirty, grainy
